commands: vp install # should install packages first
vp pm list --json # should list current workspace root dependencies
vp pm list --recursive --json # should list all packages in workspace (uses --workspaces)
vp pm list --filter app --json # should list specific workspace package (uses --workspace app)
vp pm list --filter app --filter @vite-plus-test/utils --json # should list multiple workspace packages
vp pm list --recursive --depth 0 --json # should list workspace packages with depth limit
